description: Style note An all-time favourite accessory, belts are an integral part of creating the well groomed look. This leatherette belt from turtle is set to add an sophisticated edge to your style. Also, every time you purchase a Turtle product, part of the proceeds go towards protecting and conserving turtles. This is part of the Save Turtle project created in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. Product Details Black textured belt with a tang clasp Fixed loop and holes to customise the Fit Material and Care Leatherette Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary Size Length: 105 cm
